1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/components/AffinityModal/NodeFieldsDescriptionText.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:

   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write

I'll start by reading the file to understand its current content.

Now let me reason through the fixes:

**Fix 1**: `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`
- Line 3: Change import `TextVariants` to `ContentVariants`
- Lines 10, 15, 20: Change `TextVariants.p` to `ContentVariants.p`
- The member mapping confirms `p -> p`, so `ContentVariants.p` is correct.

**Fix 2**: `Text` → `Content`
- Line 3: Change import `Text` to `Content`
- Lines 10, 14, 15, 19, 20, 21: Change `<Text ...>` / `</Text>` to `<Content ...>` / `</Content>`
- The property mapping shows `Text.component → Content.component`, `Text.className → Content.className`, `Text.children → Content.children` — all props map directly with the same names, so just the component name changes.

Both fixes affect the same import on line 3. The combined import will be:
```
import { Content, ContentVariants } from '@patternfly/react-core';
```

Let me apply all changes:

arguments.after:
<Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Field selectors let you select Nodes based on the value of one or more resource fields.',
        )}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Note that for Node field expressions, entering a full path is required in the "Key" field (e.g. "metadata.name: value").',
        )}
      </Content>
      <Content className="text-muted" component={ContentVariants.p}>
        {t('Some fields may not be supported.')}
      </Content>
arguments.before:
<Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Field selectors let you select Nodes based on the value of one or more resource fields.',
        )}
      </Text>
      <Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t(
          'Note that for Node field expressions, entering a full path is required in the "Key" field (e.g. "metadata.name: value").',
        )}
      </Text>
      <Text className="text-muted" component={TextVariants.p}>
        {t('Some fields may not be supported.')}
      </Text>

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `semver-...-textvariants-removed` | ✅ Applied | Renamed `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` in import (line 3) and all 3 JSX usages (lines 10, 15, 20) |
| Fix 2 | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Renamed `Text` → `Content` in import (line 3) and all 6 JSX tags (`<Text>` → `<Content>`, `</Text>` → `</Content>` on lines 10, 14, 15, 19, 20, 22). All props (`className`, `component`, `children`) map with identical names — no prop changes needed. |
